title: mangifera sumatrana
intro: Mangifera sumatrana, also known as the Sumatran mango or Milius mango, is a species of tree in the genus Mangifera and is native to the island of Sumatra in Indonesia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where its bark, leaves, and seeds are used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Mangifera sumatrana are believed to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and skin infections, among other health issues. Herbal preparations of Mangifera sumatrana include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential health benefits and applications.
